sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا تَخْطُو قَدَمَاكَ دَاخِلَ السُّوقِ الشَّعْبِيِّ، تَسْتَقْبِلُكَ رَوَائِحُ التَّوَابِلِ الزَّكِيَّةِ الَّتِي تَمْلأُ الْأَجْوَاءَ بِسِحْرِ الشَّرْقِ.
sentences.translation: Kada zakoračite unutar narodne pijace, dočekuju vas mirisi aromatičnih začina koji ispunjavaju atmosferu magijom Istoka.
sentences.translationEn: When you step inside the traditional market, you are greeted by the fragrant scents of spices that fill the air with the magic of the East.

sentences.arabic: تَرْتَصُّ أَكْيَاسُ الزَّعْفَرَانِ وَالْقِرْفَةِ وَالْبُخُورِ بِأَلْوَانِهَا الزَّاهِيَةِ، مِمَّا يَجْعَلُ التَّجَوُّلَ فِي الْمَمَرَّاتِ الضَّيِّقَةِ تَجْرِبَةً بَصَرِيَّةً مُذْهِلَةً.
sentences.translation: Vreće šafrana, cimeta i tamjana poredane su u jarkim bojama, što šetnju kroz uske prolaze čini nevjerovatnim vizuelnim iskustvom.
sentences.translationEn: Bags of saffron, cinnamon, and incense are arranged in bright colors, making walking through the narrow alleys a stunning visual experience.

sentences.arabic: يَتَفَاوَضُ التُّجَّارُ مَعَ الزُّبَانِ بِأُسْلُوبٍ لَبِقٍ، حَيْثُ يَعْرِضُونَ أَجْوَدَ أَنْوَاعِ الْمُكَسَّرَاتِ وَالْفَوَاكِهِ الْمُجَفَّفَةِ الَّتِي جُلِبَتْ مِنْ مَزَارِعَ بَعِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Trgovci pregovaraju s kupcima na ljubazan način, nudeći najkvalitetnije vrste orašastih plodova i sušenog voća donesenih s dalekih farmi.
sentences.translationEn: Traders negotiate with customers in a polite manner, showcasing the finest types of nuts and dried fruits brought from distant farms.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُ لِلزَّائِرِ أَنْ يَتَذَوَّقَ بَعْضَ الْعَيِّنَاتِ قَبْلَ الشِّرَاءِ، مِمَّا يُعَزِّزُ رُوحَ الثِّقَةِ وَالتَّوَاصُلِ بَيْنَ الْبَائِعِ وَالْمُشْتَرِي.
sentences.translation: Posjetilac može probati neke uzorke prije kupovine, što jača duh povjerenja i komunikacije između prodavca i kupca.
sentences.translationEn: A visitor can taste some samples before buying, which enhances the spirit of trust and communication between the seller and the buyer.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ هَذِهِ الْأَسْوَاقَ لَيْسَتْ مُجَرَّدَ مَرَاكِزَ لِلتِّجَارَةِ، بَلْ هِيَ مَعَالِمُ ثَقَافِيَّةٌ تَحْفَظُ هُوِيَّةَ الْمَدِينَةِ وَتَارِيخَهَا الْعَرِيقَ.
sentences.translation: Ove pijace nisu samo trgovački centri, već kulturne znamenitosti koje čuvaju identitet grada i njegovu drevnu historiju.
sentences.translationEn: These markets are not just centers for trade, but rather cultural landmarks that preserve the city's identity and its ancient history.
